Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A material has σ = 5 × 10–2 siemens/meter and ε = 2.5 ε0. The frequency at which magnitude of the displacement current density is equal to the conduction current density is _________ MHz. (Rounded off to the nearest integer)

NAT
Correct answer: 360
Solution

360 (359 - 361)

Q8 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Human exposure to the electromagnetic radiation in air is regarded as safe if the power density is less than 8 mW/m2. The corresponding magnitude of electric field intensity is ________ V/m. (Rounded-off to three decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 2.456
Solution

2.456 (2.300 - 2.600)
